name: Turkish BBQ Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the ribs well and pat them dry.
2. Rub the entire surface of the racks with garlic.
3. Sprinkle generously with salt and pepper.
4. Rub all over with crushed mint.
5. Place the ribs in a flat container large enough to hold them.
6. Drizzle half of the olive oil and vinegar mixture over the ribs.
7. Turn the ribs and drizzle the remaining oil and vinegar over them.
8. Let the ribs stand at room temperature overnight or for several hours in the refrigerator.
9. When ready to cook, thread the ribs onto an extra-long skewer, cutting them where necessary to fit.
10. Grill over medium-hot coals until the ribs are crispy on the outside, turning often.
11. Serve with grilled jalapeno chilies, whole small tomatoes, small whole onions, and thick eggplant slices if desired.
